failures.description: The Executor selected the wrong item from the ProductCatalogSearch result, reporting 2243454707 at $164.46 instead of the cheapest returned item, 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The tool call at index 3 returned available electric kettles sorted by ascending price, with the first and cheapest item being 1240311797 at $137.17. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 2243454707 at $164.46, which is actually the last and most expensive item in the returned list. This is a direct contradiction of the relevant tool output, so the failure is a misinterpretation of tool output rather than an invalid tool call or missing information.
